verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Australia. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (Eucalyptus, chevron signs, delineator posts) that was effectively utilized by the tournament judge to distinguish the correct country from the closest distractor (South Africa).
